arts.ttl: “Is he worth signing?” – Leeds United legend doesn’t believe Farke needs 30-year-old midfielder
arts.sum: With 15 games left of the current Championship season Leeds United are in the box seat for promotion, and Daniel Farke has been advised against signing one particular player should they manage to secure a return to the English top-flight. Leeds have been criticised for a recent transfer decision, and their fixture congestion in March […] The post “Is he worth signing?” – Leeds United legend doesn’t believe Farke needs 30-year-old midfielder appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 3 left-back targets Leeds United must consider ahead of the summer transfer window
arts.sum: Leeds United will be in the market for new recruits this summer, regardless of how their push for… The post 3 left-back targets Leeds United must consider ahead of the summer transfer window appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Ruthless Leeds United have already proven they can win the Championship title by a wide margin
arts.sum: Leeds United could win the Championship by a 'wide margin' this season, according to Sky Sports' EFL expert Don Goodman. Goodman told OLBG : "Leeds United are the most well-rounded team in the division, their win against Coventry City was huge.

arts.ttl: 3 doubts, 5 out: Leeds United’s rivals Watford dealing with sickness bug pre-match
arts.sum: Watford are up next for Leeds United as they face off at Vicarage Road this evening, and home manager Tom Cleverley is struggling with injuries, suspension and illness head of tonight’s game. However, his squad is looking somewhat depleted, especially at the top of the pitch with Kwadwo Baah ruled out with injury, top scorer Vakoun Bayo suspended due to a recent red card, and Rocco Vata one of those suffering with a sickness bug of late, alongside Yasser Larouci and Angelo Ogbonna.

arts.ttl: Leeds United transfer plans rocked as Chelsea 'close' to deal for January target
arts.sum: The Whites were linked with a move for Sporting wonderkid Dario Essugo in the recent January transfer window, but Chelsea are reportedly close to agreeing a deal for the midfielder. His reputation has increased after impressing with Las Palmas, which saw Leeds United linked with a move in the recent January transfer window, though a move would not come to fruition.

arts.ttl: Huge Leeds promotion scenario, Struijk consequence and Watford score to settle
arts.sum: Given Leeds have lost just three of their 31 Championship games this season, a scenario where United win and their promotion rivals lose would create a huge advantage for Daniel Farke’s side. Leeds have the opportunity to open up a five-point gap to second-placed Sheffield United with a win on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Farke: EFL & Sky’s Leeds decision lacks “common sense”
arts.sum: It doesn’t take much research to learn why Leeds United fans are rarely ever happy with the EFL and Sky Sports with regards to fixture scheduling, something Daniel Farke is well aware of. When I had a look at this week, it’s difficult to understand why you have to play Wednesday evening, away game, late kick-off, then why is it necessary to play Saturday lunchtime, the quickest turnaround.

arts.ttl: Tuesday's Championship predictions including Watford vs. Leeds
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Watford vs. Leeds.

arts.ttl: Leeds United predicted XI vs Watford as Ampadu moved amid nine changes
arts.sum: Pascal Struijk completed a full 90 minutes against Millwall - the first time he has done so since returning from a hamstring injury - and came through fine. Predicted Leeds United XI (4-2-3-1): Meslier; Bogle, Struijk, Rodon, Firpo; Ampadu, Tanaka; James, Aaronson, Solomon; Piroe.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke says Leeds United star is “probably” best in the EFL in his position
arts.sum: Leeds United probably have the best right-back in the Championship right now in summer signing Jayden Bogle, according to Daniel Farke. One of the changes Farke made against Millwall was to hand Isaac Schmidt a rare start at right-back in place of the superb Jayden Bogle.
